method: Loaded dwg_graph_ir.json, iterated d['block_definitions'] (list of 407 dicts each with 'name' and 'entity_count'), took max(entity_count) then sorted names of all entries tied at that max lexicographically.
commands: maxc = max(b['entity_count'] for b in bd); cands = sorted(b['name'] for b in bd if b['entity_count'] == maxc); print(maxc, cands)
